## Severity Assessment

- [ ] **P0 — Critical:** Production down / data loss / security issue
- [ ] **P1 — High:** Major feature broken for many users
- [ ] **P2 — Medium:** Feature degraded, workaround exists
- [ ] **P3 — Low:** Minor UX or cosmetic issue
